statement: Bounded, paginated diagnostics are mandatory to keep observability reliable under high-fanout runs on Convex limits.
rationale: Convex guidance emphasizes selective indexed reads and bounded scans; unbounded debug queries risk limit-triggered failures.
keyAssumptions: Telemetry volume can spike significantly during regressions
validationCriteria: All debug entry points complete under synthetic high-event load
No debug path triggers read-limit errors
critiquePoints: Some one-off deep forensics may still require paged iteration
questions: What max-event defaults are safest for routine watch/analyze loops?
